label: New
items: Customisable Quick Launcher — pin up to 6 shortcuts to your phone's Quick Access menu. Open Account Settings → Quick Launcher to choose between Lens, Today, Capture, Library, Plants, Planner, Walk, Doctor and Shopping, then reorder them with the up/down arrows. Your choices sync across devices.
Quick "Customise" link below the launcher on /quick — taps straight through to the picker, so you don't have to dig through Settings.

label: Polish
items: Quick Access — the "Open full dashboard" pill no longer clips off the bottom of the screen on shorter phones.
Quick Access — the welcome card's text stops sliding under the floating menu button when you scroll. The menu button itself now reads as deliberate floating chrome with a subtle white ring.
